problem id: 5b68563d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  11100111 -> 10011111
  01010001 -> 01000100
  01110001 -> 11000101
  00000101 -> 00010100
  10010001 -> 01000100
  10100011 -> 10001100
  00100110 -> 10011000

query: 00011001
predicted answer: 01100100
